productDisplayName: Puma Men's Ikonis Black Silver Shoe
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during runs with these Ikonis 2 XT shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. UppersLeather uppers for durability and protectionMesh panels on the heel counter and front for superior breathabilityAppliqued formstripe and cat logo on the sides in reflective materials Lace-ups for snug FitLogo print on the sideLogo applique on the tongue and embroidered logo on the heel counter Padded collar and padded tongue for greater comfortMesh tongue for superior breathabilityMidsoleEVA provides cushioning and improved shock absorptionOrthoLite sockliner for more comfort, material regeneration, air circulation and anti-microbial functionOutsoleArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-offLong-lasting CELL unit in heel for improved shock absorptionEverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areasAggressive pattern with flex grooves for enhanced flexibility of the feet
